text: Hello? Yes, baby. Good afternoon. My name is Julia. I'm just checking something as per our records from your local county in the state of North Carolina. And this will take a quick 30 seconds. Are you currently enrolled in Medicare Part A and B? I got A and B and I got D and I got the VA. Sorry, but you do not seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day. You too.
